summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens display device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name when a Falcon device is paired.
description_clean: On the onboarding screens, the device code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name. Steps: Pair a Falcon device with the app, then go to Device Settings > Onboarding. Expected: The proper name should be used on onboarding screens.
steps: Pair a Falcon device with the app
expected: The proper product name should be used on onboarding screens.
actual: The device code name "Falcon" is displayed instead of the proper product name.
